strengths: Deep TypeScript/Node.js expertise with production-scale fullstack delivery at Optilyz and re:cinq, directly matching the primary stack
Hands-on AI agent infrastructure experience including MCP code generators and agentic workflows — directly satisfying the listed AI agent development requirement
16+ years of polyglot engineering across web, embedded, mobile, and cloud (AWS CDK, Kubernetes, Docker) with consistent TDD and software craftsmanship practices
concerns: NestJS not mentioned anywhere in the resume despite being the primary backend framework in the required stack
Vitest absent from skills or projects; TDD experience is asserted but specific testing frameworks matching the stack are not listed
Kotlin not referenced at all; Java appears only in older, non-web contexts such as robotic arms and mobile device tooling

key_factors.factor: AI agent and MCP development experience

response.justification: Bogdan is a strong fit for the core of the role: his TypeScript and Node.js experience is deep and current, his React work at Optilyz covers the frontend requirement, and his AI-agent and MCP work at re:cinq directly maps to the less-common AI agent development requirement. The primary gaps are NestJS (not mentioned) and Vitest (absent), but both are lightweight lifts for an engineer already proficient in the Node/TypeScript ecosystem. Kotlin is also missing, though it is listed as a secondary technology. With 16+ years of experience, demonstrated TDD discipline, strong cloud and containerization exposure, and a consistent pattern of adopting new stacks quickly, the framework-specific gaps are unlikely to be blockers in practice.
